title: Purely Pale Croatian Pork Casseroles
description: A traditional Croatian dish featuring pork, cream, and lardons, perfect for a light meal, this recipe is onion and garlic free, making it suitable for those with sensitivities. It has a nice balance of flavors with a hint of mustard.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, render the lardons over medium heat until crispy, then set aside.
In the same skillet, add the pork cubes and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
In a large bowl, whisk together the heavy cream, dijon mustard, salt, black pepper, paprika, and caraway seeds.
Add the cooked pork and rendered lardons to the bowl and stir until the pork is well coated.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and top with chopped parsley.
Bake for 25 minutes or until the casserole is hot and the top is lightly browned.
Remove from the oven and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
